+Week 26 / day 175 observations:
+- Cash is only $6.7k after the C tier 3 damage continued through billing. Restored C tier 4 did not stop churn immediately, but tier 2 remained reliable and no overload/outage occurred.
+- Next billing window is strong (~$53k), enough to rebuild cash if we avoid changes. Keep C tier 4 + tier 2; do not cut quality again.
